columns.extraction_plan: From the CONSORT diagram (Fig 1, page 2), 397 patients were randomly assigned to the ADT plus docetaxel arm. Out of these, 7 patients did not start treatment (5 due to patient withdrawal/refusal, 1 due to medical decision, 1 due to no treatment information submitted). Thus, 397 - 7 = 390 patients received docetaxel. The percentage is (390/397)*100 = 98.2%.
From the CONSORT diagram (Fig 1, page 2), patients in the control arm were assigned to receive ADT alone and did not receive docetaxel. Therefore, N = 0 (0%).
